title: Cuneiform Tablet #0190: Old Babylonian School Tablet
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Babylonian period — a school tablet document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Babylonian period — a school tablet document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Babylonian period. School Tablet document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records school tablet matters typical of Old Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
